channel.title: LongMenShan on VBOX
channel.description: Recent content in LongMenShan on VBOX

item.title: Influence of Regional Erosion and Sedimentary Loading on Fault Activities in Active Fold-Thrust Belts
item.description: Wu Z, Yin H, Li C, Yang X, Wang L, Wang F, Dong S and Jia D (2021) Influence of Regional Erosion and Sedimentary Loading on Fault Activities in Active Fold-Thrust Belts: Insights From Discrete Element Simulation and the Southern and Central Longmen Shan Fold- Thrust Belt. Front. Earth Sci. 9:659682. doi: 10.3389/feart.2021.659682 Title Influence of Regional Erosion and Sedimentary Loading on Fault Activities in Active Fold-Thrust Belts: Insights From Discrete Element Simulation and the Southern and Central Longmen Shan Fold-Thrust Belt
